signals.headline: FED ANNOUNCES NO APRIL RATE CHANGE, RAISES 2026 INFLATION PROJECTIONS AMID OIL SHOCK | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
FED ANNOUNCES NO APRIL RATE CHANGE, RAISES 2026 INFLATION PROJECTIONS AMID OIL SHOCK | YES | HIGH**  
The Federal Reserve confirmed on April 28–29, 2026 (recent relative to today), that it will hold interest rates steady at 3.50%–3.75%, with markets pricing >97% probability of no change due to oil-driven inflation pressures from geopolitical tensions.[1][3]  
Updated Summary of Economic Projection
